questions.question_text: Answer the following questions a Define the term "hazard" with an example. b Describe the post-disaster management strategies and their importance for long-term recovery. c What was the cause of the Bhopal Gas Tragedy? d What is meant by disaster vulnerability? e Explain the role of Remote Sensing and GIS in disaster management. f Describe the application of drones in disaster response and assessment. g What is the significance of mock drills in disaster preparedness? h Name the nodal agency for disaster management in India.
Define disaster. Explain the concept of risk reduction with the help of a disaster scenario. 10
Differentiate between preparedness, mitigation, and prevention in the pre-disaster phase with suitable examples. 10
Differentiate between natural and man-made disasters and list any one mega disasters of India from each category. 10
Explain the impact of the 2004 Indian Ocean Tsunami and lessons learnt. 10
How is mobile technology and ICT used in disaster risk reduction and management? 10
What is NavIC and how is it different from GPS in disaster management applications? 10

subparts.text: What is the Disaster Management Act 2005? Describe its main provisions.
Explain the structure and functions of the National Disaster Management Authority 10
Discuss the importance and procedure of a fire drill in institutional buildings.
What are the methods of one-person and two-person rescue operations during a disaster? 10

subparts.question_text: Describe the steps involved in conducting fire and earthquake evacuation drills. How do these drills contribute to disaster preparedness?
